title: Education Administrators, Kindergarten through Secondary
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the academic, administrative, or auxiliary activities of kindergarten, elementary, or secondary schools.

tasks.text: Counsel and provide guidance to students regarding personal, academic, vocational, or behavioral issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with parents and staff to discuss educational activities, policies, and student behavior or learning problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine the scope of educational program offerings, and prepare drafts of course schedules and descriptions to estimate staffing and facility requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe teaching methods and examine learning materials to evaluate and standardize curricula and teaching techniques and to determine areas for improvement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with teachers to develop and maintain curriculum standards, develop mission statements, and set performance goals and objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Enforce discipline and attendance rules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recruit, hire, train, and evaluate primary and supplemental staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan and lead professional development activities for teachers, administrators, and support staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate activities of teachers, administrators, and support staff at schools, public agencies, and institutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set educational standards and goals, and help establish policies and procedures to carry them out.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate curricula, teaching methods, and programs to determine their effectiveness, efficiency, and use, and to ensure compliance with federal, state, and local regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create school improvement plans, using student performance data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine allocations of funds for staff, supplies, materials, and equipment, and authorize purchases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit budget requests and recommendations, or grant proposals to solicit program funding.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and develop instructional methods and content for educational, vocational, or student activity programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in special education-related activities, such as attending meetings and providing support to special educators throughout the district.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend personnel actions related to programs and services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, maintain, or oversee the preparation and maintenance of attendance, activity, planning, or personnel reports and records.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach classes or courses to students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and approve new programs, or recommend modifications to existing programs, submitting program proposals for school board approval as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with federal, state, and local agencies to stay abreast of policies and to discuss improvements for education programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write articles, manuals, and other publications, and assist in the distribution of promotional literature about facilities and programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate and direct extracurricular activities and programs, such as after-school events and athletic contests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and direct committees of specialists, volunteers, and staff to provide technical and advisory assistance for programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish, coordinate, and oversee particular programs across school districts, such as programs to evaluate student academic achievement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mentor and support administrative staff members, such as superintendents and principals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze survey data, regulatory information, and data on demographic and employment trends to forecast enrollment patterns and curriculum change needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Advocate for new schools to be built, or for existing facilities to be repaired or remodeled.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, coordinate, and oversee school logistics programs, such as bus and food services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and interpret government codes, and develop programs to ensure adherence to codes and facility safety, security, and maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop partnerships with businesses, communities, and other organizations to help meet identified educational needs and to provide school-to-work programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate school maintenance services and the use of school facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
